title: arif_seal (symbolic hardening)
description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §3 — additive symbolic hardening for `arif_seal`. This schema is APPENDED to the existing arifos schema for `arif_seal` and does not rewrite any pre-existing field. Spec: /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §3. Note: arif_seal MUST verify domain even when the tool itself is constitutional — protects against cross-surface contamination.

seal_disambiguation.description: §3.I — ties to Rule Zero. Even though arif_seal is the constitutional SEAL tool, the input it receives must disambiguate which kind of seal is being asked for.

symbolic_assessment.description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §8 — Every arif_seal output should carry this symbolic_assessment block so callers can distinguish literal from symbolic, identify authority, and preserve reversibility. See /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §8.
